weekly_focus.behavior: Implement a 30-minute phone-free wind-down at 1:30 AM before sleep.
weekly_focus.rationale: With a 2 AM bedtime and early toddler wake-ups, improving the quality of your restricted sleep window is the highest leverage move for long-term health.

physical_activity_goal: 3 bodyweight strength sessions per week plus daily morning dog walks to hit 7,000 steps.
nutrition_goal: Maintain Mediterranean-style pescatarian eating with a focus on 90 grams of protein daily.
sleep_goal: Consistent 2 AM to 8:30 AM sleep window with a dedicated 30-minute screen-free buffer.
why_this_works: Focusing on a wind-down routine helps lower cortisol from your late-night work block, while bodyweight exercises ensure you can stay consistent whether you are at home or traveling.
safety_disclaimer: Remember: Consult with your physician before starting any new health or fitness plan.
